name: Inverse Kinematics
description: Solve inverse kinematics for a target using the given planner and starting RobotCellState.

inputParameters.name: planner
inputParameters.description: A planner instance (AnalyticalKinematicsPlanner, MoveItPlanner, PyBulletPlanner, AnalyticalPyBulletPlanner).

inputParameters.name: start_state
inputParameters.description: Starting RobotCellState. The robot's configuration in this state is used as the IK seed.

inputParameters.name: group
inputParameters.description: Optional planning group name. Defaults to the cell's main planning group.

inputParameters.name: check_collision
inputParameters.description: When True, only collision-free IK solutions are returned; when False, in-collision solutions are accepted. Unwired keeps the backend default (True: collision-free).

outputParameters.name: configuration
outputParameters.description: Resulting Configuration, or None if no solution was found.

outputParameters.name: cell_state
outputParameters.description: A copy of the start_state with `robot_configuration` set to the IK result. Wire straight into VisualizeRobotCell / ForwardKinematics / next planner step- no SetRobotConfiguration needed.
